calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610.

**NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b)if there is no appearance at the next hearing date and compliance.**

Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
